metadata.description: Known blockers preventing cells from completion. Track by severity: high=blocks deployment, medium=requires mitigation, low=nice to have

blockers.issue: Discord Activities have 10MB bundle size limit; mini-sudoku with all constraints may exceed this
blockers.resolution: Lazy-load constraint propagation, tree-shake unused code, analyze bundle composition

blockers.issue: Telegram Mini Apps have 8MB bundle size limit; may be tight with full CSP implementation
Numberlink path solver is NP-complete; large boards will block main thread without optimization
blockers.resolution: Move solver to Web Worker, implement iterative deepening, add solve time limits

blockers.issue: Path solver + graph algorithms will exceed Discord 10MB bundle limit
blockers.resolution: Lazy-load solver, implement streaming solution validation, use worker-based computation

blockers.issue: Path solver will likely exceed Telegram 8MB bundle limit
blockers.resolution: Aggressive tree-shaking, solver-only worker, minimal UI bundle

blockers.issue: Word ladder requires english dictionary; loading full dictionary into bundle is infeasible (500KB+)
blockers.resolution: Use trie data structure, load dictionary dynamically, consider server-side validation option

blockers.issue: Dictionary handling on mobile requires careful memory management and offline access
blockers.resolution: IndexedDB caching, compressed dictionary, lazy-load by word length

blockers.issue: Discord Activities require full offline capability; word ladder needs dictionary in offline context
blockers.resolution: Embed compressed dictionary, sync on connection restore, cache known words

blockers.issue: Polyomino placement (exact cover problem) is NP-complete; large puzzles need optimization
blockers.resolution: Implement DLX (Dancing Links) algorithm, use constraint propagation, consider multiple solvers by difficulty

blockers.issue: Polyomino puzzle generation from scratch is difficult; reverse process (remove shapes) preferred
blockers.resolution: Method: generate solved tiling → identify contiguous regions → create puzzle. Verify solvability.

blockers.issue: N-Queens with N>12 can take >3s without optimization; Meta loading target is 3s
blockers.resolution: Start with N=8 default, optimize backtracking with constraint propagation, profile on target device

blockers.issue: Real-time collaborative Takuzu not in initial scope; single-player only
blockers.resolution: Deferred to phase 2; architecture designed to support later

blockers.issue: Pinpoint requires selection of 4 groups; mobile UI needs careful tap target sizing
blockers.resolution: Min 48px tap target, visual feedback, undo available, preview grouping before confirm

criticalPaths: zip: path solver NP-complete, bundle constraints on Discord/Telegram
crossclimb: dictionary management and offline capability
patches: algorithm selection (DLX vs backtracking) and puzzle generation
mini-sudoku: bundle size on Discord/Telegram platforms

phase2.title: Core Implementation + Optimization
phase2.deliverable: Feature-complete game with blockers resolved or mitigated

phase4.title: Launch + Monitoring
phase4.deliverable: All cells marked complete with SLO tracking
